content.speakerText: Well, I should get going—I've got a meeting in 10.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，10分钟后有个会。

options.text: Why are you leaving so early?
Can you stay a little longer?
I don't care when you leave.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Okay, see you tomorrow!' 是礼貌且积极的回应，符合告别场景。选项2和3是要求对方留下，与对方要离开的语境冲突；选项4语气生硬，缺乏礼貌，不符合‘礼貌告别’场景。

content.speakerText: I'm heading to the market now—want me to grab you anything?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正要去超市，要帮你带点什么吗？

options.text: Sure, could you get me some eggs? I'll treat you next time!
Why are you going to the market?
I'm too busy to think about food right now.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌请求 + 感谢承诺，符合友好互动语境。选项2只是否定需求，缺乏礼貌回应；选项3和4偏离主题，前者追问原因，后者消极回应，均不符合‘礼貌告别+主动帮助’的语用目标。

content.speakerText: I've got to head out—thanks for the chat!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，谢谢你的聊天！

options.text: Anytime! Let’s grab coffee next week.
Yeah, you always talk too much.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime! Let’s grab coffee next week.' 不仅礼貌回应，还主动提议下次见面，完美体现‘为下次见面留余地’的核心目标。选项2和4不友好，选项3虽然正确但过于简单，缺乏情感温度和未来连接。

content.template: I should get going—___ you need help, just let me know!
content.hint: 表达‘如果有需要’的条件句常用词
content.knowledgePoint: 条件句表达（if 引导的让步性建议）

content.template: That's so kind of you! I'll ___ you one!
content.hint: 表达‘我改天请你’的固定搭配

content.template: Catch you ___! Let's plan something soon.
content.hint: 非正式告别常用语，表示‘回头见’
content.knowledgePoint: 口语告别固定短语（Catch you later）

content.speakerText: Well, I should get going—I've got a meeting in 10.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，10分钟后有个会。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for your time—I’ll text you if I need anything!
Alright, have a great meeting! Let’s chat again soon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并接受对方离开
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个告别/未来连接关键词（如 catch you later, let's chat, text you）

content.speakerText: I'm heading to the market now—want me to grab you anything?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正要去超市，要帮你带点什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Aw, that's so nice! Could you get me some bread? I owe you one!
Thanks for offering—I'm all set, but really appreciate it!
Yes, please! Milk and fruit would be great. I'll treat you next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应对方的好意
语言准确性：是否正确使用感谢、请求或拒绝的表达
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达（如 'aw, that's so kind', 'I owe you one'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词（grabs, owe, treat, appreciate）

content.speakerText: I'm heading out—thanks for hanging out today!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要走了，谢谢今天陪我！
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Let’s do this again next weekend!
You're welcome! I had a great time—call me when you're free!
Thanks for the company! I’m looking forward to our next coffee!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并主动建立未来联系
语言准确性：语法和时态是否正确，是否使用恰当的连接词
表达自然度：是否使用了符合英语母语者习惯的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少两个关键词（hanging out, next time, call me, look forward to）
